body.title: Graph-first k-NN memory type classifier
body.result: knn_classifier.py: classify() + build_index(); 6 tests pass; FACTUAL fallback when no embeddings; holdout excluded (3592ef8f)
body.intention: I intend that the graph-first classifier demonstrates that existing embeddings can classify programming-book content with zero cloud calls.
body.description:
Build Personality A: embed input text via embedder.embed(), query competition.memory_embeddings for K nearest neighbors (non-holdout rows only), vote by memory_type distribution, return majority. Zero LLM calls.

**Affected files:** New `lab/competition/classifiers/knn_classifier.py`; uses `devices.igor.cognition.embedder` (LOW inertia)
**Design rules:** No LLM calls; pure graph lookup; fallback to FACTUAL if tie
**Scope boundary:** classify(text) → memory_type. No training loop — k-NN is instance-based. No changes to embedder.
**Completion criteria:** `knn_classifier.classify(text)` returns a memory_type string; classifying 5 sample programming-book sentences produces plausible types; cloud_calls_count=0 per classification.
